sections.heading: Proprietary Platform Performance (baioniq, Dociphi)

fields.label: Number of active clients for Dociphi platform
fields.value: 2 customers (as of an unspecified date, compared to ConnectWise)

fields.label: Key features/capabilities added to platforms (last 12 months)

value.description: Availability as a trial subscription, offering Starter and Enterprise plans with features like document uploading, content generation, summarization, parameter fine-tuning, assistance and discovery modes, and model management.
Integration with NVIDIA AI Enterprise software, including NVIDIA NIM and NVIDIA NeMo Retriever inference microservices, enabling automation of workflows and data management.
Enhanced LLM flexibility, offering access to a diverse pool of Large Language Models (LLMs) with the ability to switch between them effortlessly.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Pipeline, an innovative pipeline that retrieves relevant information to ensure more accurate and contextually relevant output.
Custom LLM Deployment, allowing tailoring AI models to specific business requirements.
Support for Prompt Engineering and Human-in-the-Loop, enabling fine-tuning prompts and incorporating human oversight for high-quality results.
Web Search and Agent Support, integrating web search capabilities and AI agents.
Data Processing Versatility, able to process structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data sources, supporting multi-modality.
Integration with existing systems like Sharepoint, Workday, Salesforce, and ServiceNow.
Addresses critical LLM issues such as lack of domain understanding, hallucinations, and data security, and fine-tunes models responsibly and ethically.
Meets HIPAA, SOC2 Type 1, and 2 compliance and security standards.
Availability on cloud marketplaces: Google Cloud, Amazon Web Services, and Snowflake Marketplace.
New patent granted by the USPTO for its intuitive user interface, protecting the 'look and feel' of the platform in data extraction.
GenAI-Driven Decision Support, providing contextual recommendations and summaries.
Automated Compliance & Fraud Detection, ensuring regulatory adherence and detecting anomalies with AI-powered validation.
AI-Powered Claims Assessment, automating claim evaluation with AI-driven insights for faster, more accurate processing.
Template-Free Intelligent Document Processing, extracting data from unstructured claims documents without pre-defined templates.
Availability on Snowflake Marketplace.
Integration with existing systems via APIs and connectors for seamless data flow and workflow automation.

bullets: Number of active clients for Dociphi platform: 2 customers (as of an unspecified date, compared to ConnectWise)

reasoning.consultant: Quantiphi's specific hyperscaler specializations and joint solutions would directly inform a consultant's assessment of their ability to deliver on specific cloud-native or AI-driven transformation projects for clients, influencing whether to pursue them as a partner or case study.
